name: node-path-dirname

summary: Node.js library for function path.dirname ponyfill
description:
Node.js library for function path.dirname ponyfill
This was needed in order to expose path.posix.dirname() on Node.js v0.10
.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-path-dirname as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-path-dirname with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-path-dirname --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
